primary_text:
Two supply chains feed Sydney families. One moves food thousands of kilometres through cold storage over weeks. The other moves it from a named NSW farm to the Brookvale hub in days.

FarmThru built the shorter one. Zero middlemen. The farmer earns more. You know their name.

Scaling a better system takes people who believe it should exist. We are opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal in mid-2026.

We cannot promise returns. We can show you everything.
headline: Two supply chains. One is broken
description: Help build the shorter one. FarmThru equity crowdfunding on Birchal, mid-2026. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Two-frame animation. Frame 1: long chain with 5 steps, grey tones. Frame 2: short 2-step chain, green and warm. Simple, visual, immediate.
